_comment: Registry of generated network/simulation artifacts. All artifacts are gitignored and regenerable from configs + seed via `ca1 build` / `ca1 sim`. Correct future artifacts are added here with {config, seed, git_sha, sha256, n_cells_per_type}. The entries below are LEGACY binaries produced by the pre-restructure buggy builders; they were deleted during the restructure because they are stale and known-wrong, and the new builder regenerates them correctly.

defects: Neurogliaform population silently dropped (8 of 9 types)
only 19 connectivity types (missing excitatory pyr_to_* / pv_to_*)
only 3 cell types, AllToAll, hand-picked weights
not a CA1 model (base_type/top_type tutorial artifact)
